sectionHeadings: 2026-07-20: the addon transferred out; this spec narrowed, not retired
record.summary: The platform's tamper-evident memory and its decision spine, built on the four crates extracted from OAP's policy-kernel: attest-ledger (tamper-evident record chain + signed anchors), canonical-keysort-json (byte-identical canonical JSON), action-gate (pure deterministic Gate over an ordered Check registry), and trust-window (rolling-window trust scorer mapping to graduated privilege). A napi-rs addon wraps the Rust crates; a governance/ Encore service exposes record/verify/gate/trust APIs that factory (005) and fleet (006) call at their privileged moments. This is the platform's differentiator: not that it deploys apps, but that every privileged act is gated, recorded, and independently verifiable.
record.title: Governance spine: attestation ledger + action gate + trust window
